title: galactia striata var. tenuiflora
intro: Galactia striata var. tenuiflora, commonly known as the Slender Milkpea or Slender Galactia, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial vine with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant contains compounds like flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as wound healing, antiseptic effects, and potential anti-cancer properties. Galactia striata var. tenuiflora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in folk medicine to treat conditions like fever, colds, and skin issues.
